title: Tangy Fluffy American Broccoli Casserole
description: A one-pot, paleo-friendly casserole featuring Chinese broccoli, coconut milk, and a tangy tamari-lemon glaze, finished with a fluffy, airy layer of almond flour and eggs.

ingredients.name: Chinese broccoli (gai lan)
ingredients.notes: washed and cut into bite‑size pieces

instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté the Chinese broccoli for 4‑5 minutes until it wilts.
Stir in tamari, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, lemon zest, salt, and pepper; cook for another 2 minutes to coat the greens.
Whisk the eggs, coconut milk, and almond flour together in a bowl until smooth. Pour the mixture over the broccoli in the skillet, stirring gently to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 18‑20 minutes until the top is golden and the mixture sets. Remove, let rest 5 minutes, then serve warm.
